ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "number_of_constituencies" INTEGER /* Number of constituencies in the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current population of the state */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* URL of the official state government website */,
  "chief_minister" TEXT /* Name of the current Chief Minister */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the current Governor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "political_parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "party_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the political party */,
  "party_leader" TEXT /* Current leader of the political party */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the political party was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the party's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the party's official website */,
  "total_seats" INTEGER /* Total number of seats held by the party in all legislative assemblies */,
  "vice_leader" TEXT /* Name of the party's vice leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legislative_houses" (
  "house_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislative house */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the house is located */,
  "house_name" TEXT /* Name of the legislative house (e.g., Fifteenth, Seventh) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the legislative house session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the legislative house session */,
  "ruling_party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ruling party of the house */,
  "total_members" INTEGER /* Total number of members in the house */,
  "total_seats" INTEGER /* Total number of seats in the house */,
  "opposition_leader" TEXT /* Name of the opposition leader in the house */,
  "majority_margin" INTEGER /* Number of seats by which the ruling party has a majority */,
  "last_budget_date" TEXT /* Date of the last budget presentation */,
  "last_budget_url" TEXT /* URL to the last budget document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("house_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legislative_houses_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legislative_houses_ruling_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("ruling_party_id") REFERENCES political_parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constituencies" (
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constituency */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the constituency is located */,
  "constituency_name" TEXT /* Name of the constituency */,
  "district" TEXT /* District where the constituency is located */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current representative of the constituency */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the constituency */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the constituency in square kilometers */,
  "last_election_turnout" TEXT /* Percentage of voter turnout in the last election */,
  "next_election_year" INTEGER /* Year of the next election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constituency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constituencies_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constituencies_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("representative_id") REFERENCES representatives ("representative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "representatives" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each representative */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the representative */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the representative */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political party of the representative */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the constituency the representative represents */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the representative */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the representative */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the representative */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the representative's official website */,
  "previous_constituency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the previous constituency if the representative has changed constituencies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representatives_previous_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representatives_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representatives_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES political_parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the election took place */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "winning_party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the winning political party */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters */,
  "voter_turnout" TEXT /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  "total_seats_contested" INTEGER /* Total number of seats contested in the election */,
  "total_seats_won" INTEGER /* Total number of seats won by the winning party */,
  "election_url" TEXT /* URL to the official election results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_winning_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("winning_party_id") REFERENCES political_parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legislative_bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislative bill */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legislative house where the bill was introduced */,
  "bill_name" TEXT /* Name of the bill */,
  "introduced_date" TEXT /* Date the bill was introduced */,
  "passed_date" TEXT /* Date the bill was passed */,
  "bill_status" TEXT /* Current status of the bill (e.g., introduced, passed, rejected) */,
  "introduced_by" TEXT /* Name of the representative who introduced the bill */,
  "bill_url" TEXT /* URL to the full text of the bill */,
  "committee" TEXT /* Name of the committee that reviewed the bill */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the bill status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legislative_bills_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("house_id") REFERENCES legislative_houses ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committee_meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee meeting */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legislative house where the meeting took place */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the meeting */,
  "agenda" TEXT /* Agenda of the meeting */,
  "chairperson" TEXT /* Name of the chairperson of the committee */,
  "minutes_url" TEXT /* URL to the minutes of the meeting */,
  "meeting_type" TEXT /* Type of meeting (e.g., regular, special) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_meetings_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("house_id") REFERENCES legislative_houses ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, public user) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
